title: Persona Rankings — allowlisted row schema (v1, spec v4.2)
description: Authoritative allowlist for dashboard/data/persona-rankings.jsonl rows. additionalProperties: false at every level is the privacy gate enforced by tests/test-allowlist.sh (A10). Any field not listed here is rejected. Bump schema_version on breaking changes; do NOT add fields without a security PR. Spec: docs/specs/token-economics/spec.md (v4.2). Deltas: Δ1 dropped window_start_artifact_dir; Δ2 renamed last_seen → last_artifact_created_at (minute-truncated); Δ3 contributing_finding_ids are per-machine salted. M3 added cost_runs_in_window; M4 added the silent run_state plus silent_runs_count.

schema_version.description: Forward-compat marker. v1 readers (dashboard) skip rows where schema_version > KNOWN_MAX.

persona.description: Persona slug as it appears in personas/<gate>/<name>.md (NFC-normalized, lowercase, hyphenated).

runs_in_window.description: Count of artifact directories contributing to the VALUE window. Per M3, cost_only rows do NOT count here.

cost_runs_in_window.description: M3: cost-window count (independent of value-window). Count of Agent dispatches contributing tokens. Includes cost_only rows.

silent.description: M4: status:ok with findings_emitted:0 (ran successfully, raised nothing).

cost_only.description: Cost-window only; does NOT count toward runs_in_window per M3.

run_state_counts.description: Per-state counts. A2 verifies sum(complete_value+silent+missing_*+malformed) == runs_in_window and that cost_only contributes to cost_runs_in_window only.

total_emitted.description: Sum of bullets in raw/<persona>.md across complete_value + silent + missing_survival rows.

total_judge_retained.description: Sum of findings.jsonl rows where persona ∈ personas[]; counts complete_value + silent + missing_survival.

total_downstream_survived.description: Sum of survival.jsonl rows with outcome == addressed; counts complete_value only.

total_unique.description: Sum of findings.jsonl rows where unique_to_persona == persona; counts complete_value + missing_survival.

silent_runs_count.description: M4: count of silent runs (status:ok, findings_emitted:0). Informational; equals run_state_counts.silent.

total_tokens.description: M3: sum across COST window (cost_runs_in_window dispatches), NOT value window.

judge_retention_ratio.description: total_judge_retained / total_emitted. null iff total_emitted == 0 (e10). Compression ratio, NOT survival or probability — Judge can split one raw bullet across multiple findings (ratio > 1.0) or merge bullets (ratio < 1.0). No upper bound; ratios > 1.0 are honest signal that this persona's bullets get split during clustering. Caught at /build by Wave 3 task 3.1 against MonsterFlow's own docs/specs.

avg_tokens_per_invocation.description: M3: total_tokens / cost_runs_in_window (cost-window denominator, NOT value-window). null iff cost_runs_in_window == 0.

last_artifact_created_at.description: Δ2: minute-truncated ISO-8601 UTC. Sourced from MAX(run.json.created_at) of contributing artifact directories, rounded down to the minute (seconds always 00). NEVER file mtime. Excluded from idempotency diff.

persona_content_hash.description: CURRENT hash of personas/<gate>/<persona>.md (NFC + LF-normalized, then sha256). null iff persona file deleted (e7).

contributing_finding_ids.description: Δ3: per-machine SALTED finding IDs (sha256(salt || normalized_signature)[:10]) with gate prefix. Most-recent 50 by run.json.created_at, then sorted lexicographically before emit for idempotent diff. Surplus rolled into truncated_count. Cross-machine ID stability is NOT a v1 feature.

truncated_count.description: Count of contributing finding IDs beyond the 50-cap.

insufficient_sample.description: true iff runs_in_window < 3. Dashboard renders rate cells as '—'; row excluded from /wrap-insights top/bottom lists.
